summary: Iter7 multi-group session feature tested end-to-end. Backend: 5/5 new iter7 tests PASS (POST /api/sessions accepts group_ids list, persistence verified via GET; legacy group_id singular still works; promo-entière session with neither group_id nor group_ids; PUT updates group_ids; recap-ue counts len(group_ids) for nb_groupes on multi-group sessions => temps_formateur = heures*nb_formateurs*len(group_ids)). Non-regression: 16/16 iter6+iter5+iter4 backend tests still PASS (21/21 total). Frontend: BOTH modals validated visually + interactively. (1) Planning Global Nouvelle séance modal: data-testid=session-group-all present, 'Promo entière' button toggles correctly (highlights blue when group_ids empty, deselects all groups on click). Clicking Groupe 1 + Groupe 2 checkboxes correctly tracks state (checked labels = ['Groupe 1','Groupe 2']) and de-highlights Promo entière button. (2) Coordination Planning > Séances modal: data-testid=session-group present with 11 checkboxes + Promo entière button. Clicked 1/2 promo + 1/4 promo => both checked. Conflict detection visible: 21 'Conflit' badges rendered across the seance list in coordination (intersection-based logic in CoordinationPlanning.js:185 uses group_ids || [group_id] for both sides, ok).

issues: When NO promotion is selected, the group multi-checkbox area lists ALL groups across all promotions (11 visible: 1/2 promo, 1/4 promo, Groupe 1..7, Groupe suivi Ped', Promo entière). The filter `groups.filter(g => !editSession.promotion_id || g.promotion_id === editSession.promotion_id)` falls back to all groups. UX risk: user can check groups that don't belong to the promo finally selected. Suggest disabling the multi-checkbox until a promotion is chosen, or filtering by selected promo first.

A DB-defined group literally named 'Promo entière' appears as a regular checkbox in the list, alongside the dedicated 'Promo entière' button at the top — visually confusing duplicate. Either rename the seed group or hide it from the list.

action_items: (Low) Disable or visually grey-out the Groupes multi-checkbox until a Promotion is selected in both modals (PlanningGlobal.js:841 and CoordinationPlanning.js:~361). Today the area shows ALL groups across promos when promo is empty, which could lead to inconsistent group_ids.

(Low) The 'Promo entière' button label clashes with a seeded group of the same name (visible as both a top button AND a checkbox at the end of the list). Consider renaming the seed group or excluding labels matching reserved keywords from the checkbox area.
(Optional) Add a small inline counter 'X groupe(s) sélectionné(s)' next to the Groupes label for quick visual feedback when many groups are present.
critical_code_review_comments: PlanningGlobal.js now 931 LOC (was 898 in iter6) — significantly above the 700-LOC threshold; refactor to extract NewSessionModal, GroupMultiSelector, SidebarAProgrammer components.

Dual-write pattern `group_ids: next, group_id: next[0] || ''` is present in BOTH PlanningGlobal.js:863 and CoordinationPlanning.js:375 — fine for backward compat, but worth extracting to a shared util. Note: when user picks 0 groups (Promo entière) the code emits group_id=''. Backend stores it as empty string; recap-ue branch `s.get('group_ids') or ([s['group_id']] if s.get('group_id') else [])` treats empty string as falsy -> nb_groupes defaults to 1. Verified consistent.

CoordinationPlanning.js hasConflict (line 185) requires BOTH sGroups.length>0 AND oGroups.length>0 to trigger sharesGroup. Implication: a 'Promo entière' session (group_ids=[]) does NOT conflict with a per-group session at the same time — semantically wrong (the promo-wide session would cover those students too). Recommend: if either side is empty (Promo entière) AND same promo + overlapping time, mark as conflict.
Backend POST /api/sessions has no Pydantic schema (raw dict pass-through) — group_ids is accepted but not validated as List[str]. Acceptable per agent-context note, but a long-term tech-debt item.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on multi-checkbox UI in both modals (PG + Coord)

seed_data_creation: Sessions prefixed TEST_iter7_, cleaned up via try/finally DELETE /api/sessions/{id}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter7 multi-group session feature is functional end-to-end. Backend stores group_ids as a list passthrough (no schema change needed). Frontend dual-writes group_ids + group_id (=first item) for backward compat. Two real UX issues exposed by testing: (1) groups listed in the multi-checkbox area are NOT filtered by selected promotion when promo is empty — leads to all-promos cross-listing; (2) hasConflict in CoordinationPlanning ignores promo-entière vs per-group overlap which is a real semantic gap. Neither blocks the main feature. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter7_session_group_ids.py.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found this iteration.
